mismatch.description: The schema sets additionalProperties: false on the signal object. Only fields defined in the schema's properties are permitted: signal_id, producer_id, timestamp, symbol, direction, confidence, horizon_hours, action, schema_version, regime_context, attribution_hash, calibration, weak_symbol, metadata. Producer-specific extension fields must go inside the 'metadata' object (which allows additionalProperties: true).
mismatch.remediation_applied: Move non-schema fields (signal_type, expected_karma, voi_included, voi_suppressed, duration_gated, weak_symbol_inverted, policy_gates_applied) into the 'metadata' object. Also move flat regime fields (regime, regime_confidence, regime_duration_days, proximity) into regime_context. The metadata object is designed as the catch-all for producer-specific data.

patch.description: Moved 7 producer-specific extension fields from signal top-level into the metadata object (which permits additionalProperties). Fields moved: signal_type, expected_karma, voi_included, voi_suppressed, duration_gated, weak_symbol_inverted, policy_gates_applied. Also added attribution_hash for tamper detection (SHA-256 of signal_id|symbol|direction|confidence|horizon_hours|timestamp).
patch.code_after: metadata: { signal_type: st, expected_karma: ..., voi_included: ..., voi_suppressed: ..., duration_gated: ..., weak_symbol_inverted: ..., policy_gates_applied: {...} }

conformance_command: python3 check_conformance.py --endpoint http://localhost:8080/signals/latest --schema producer_signal_schema.json --mismatch extra_fields_present --before-snapshot snapshots/before_mismatch4_5.json -o conformance_receipt.json --summary

limitations.description: Before snapshot is stored, not captured live in same session
Conformance checks single mismatch, not full schema validation
Point-in-time check; future code changes could regress
Policy consistency check infers expected action from gate flags, not from source logic
INVERT conditional check (weak_symbol metadata) not fully testable under SYSTEMIC regime
After snapshot fetched at check time; signals may differ from moment of patch verification
